channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in HTML (Monthly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in HTML nel periodo monthly.

item.title: 📝 alchaincyf/huashu-design (4636 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: alchaincyf

📝 Repository: alchaincyf/huashu-design

item.title: 📝 Sushegaad/Claude-Skills-Governance-Risk-and-Compliance (248 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: Sushegaad

📝 Repository: Sushegaad/Claude-Skills-Governance-Risk-and-Compliance

📄 Descrizione: Claude Skills for Governance, Risk & Compliance (GRC): Expert-level compliance guidance for ISO 27001, SOC 2, FedRAMP, GDPR, HIPAA, NIST CSF, PCI DSS, TSA Cybersecurity, and ISO 42001 AI Management System. Skills scored 94% vs a baseline of 72% without using Skills.

⭐ Stelle: 248
